title: Snad
description: This mod adds a block known as "Snad" which unlike it's counterpart "Sand" WILL increase the growth rate for sugarcane, cacti and any other plantable crop.
body:
This mod adds a block known as "Snad" which unlike it's counterpart "Sand" WILL increase the growth rate for sugarcane, cacti and any other plantable crop.

To craft a block of Snad you merely need to put two sand together in your inventory (or any form of crafting) and suddenly you'll have an amazingly awesome block of Snad.
